description:
central locking (with remote control)
electrically adjustable mirrors (heated mirrors)
electrical tailgate opening system (remote)
mirrors in sunshields (enlighted)
virtual interior rear view mirror
adjustable seat height (driver's seat)
front armrest (with compartment)
gear change from steering wheel
rear armrest (with compartment)
steering wheel adjustment (height and depth)
comes with the car (summer tires)
